tasks.description: Full regression suite + data-integrity check. Triggered by risk score 9 (FEAT-045 [1/3] touched schema + RLS + shared types/client) AND cadence floor (8 iterations since last regression at iter 64).
acceptance_criteria: All 19 core regression checks pass (login, workspace, canvas, panels, list/gap/compare views, settings, teams, perspectives, exports)
Search/filter on People, Tools, Teams views works (added iter 68-69)
Comments API routes respond correctly: GET /api/v1/comments (200), POST (201 or 401), PATCH/DELETE by id (401 unauthed)
Comments table structure verified: columns match migration 014 (id, workspace_id, commentable_type, commentable_id, parent_id, author_id, content, category, is_resolved, created_at, updated_at)
Comments RLS policies exist and use can_access_workspace()
Type definitions in database.ts match DB schema (Comment, CommentCategory, CommentableType)
Client wrappers in client.ts exist (fetchComments, createComment, updateComment, deleteComment)
No new lint errors (npm run lint)

learnings_relevant: API route HTTP methods — sections/stages POST-only (LEARNINGS.md)

tasks.special_instructions: This is a testing-only iteration. No code changes. Run static analysis via Explore agents (3 parallel) + API probing via curl. Check all 19 core regression items from iteration 64, plus 5 additional checks for features added since (dashboard, people, tools, search/filter, comments API). Data-integrity: verify comments migration structure, RLS policies, and type definitions match. Write results to testing/RESULTS.md.

shared_files.note: Testing-only iteration — no files should be modified except testing/RESULTS.md and knowledge/ handoff files.

testing_plan.regression_reason: Risk score 9 from iteration 71 (schema + RLS + shared components + partial result). Cadence floor triggered (8 iterations since last regression at iter 64).

warnings_added: Regression triggered by risk score 9 AND cadence floor. IMP-001 and FEAT-045 [2/3] deferred to iteration 73.
Builder slot 2 has failed to execute in 2 consecutive iterations (70, 71). Pipeline dispatch issue may need investigation.
